title: rhinanthus freynii var. croaticus
intro: Rhinanthus freynii var. croaticus, also known as the Croatian Bee Orchid or Yellow Rattle, is a plant species in the Orobanchaceae family. It is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants, typically grasses, and drawing sustenance from them. Rhinanthus freynii var. croaticus has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal purposes, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine in Croatia and surrounding regions.
